name: Cinnamon Scented Apple Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 3 Golden Delicious Apples - peeled, cored, and sliced
1/2 cup Pecans, walnuts, or almonds (coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in a large pan of boiling, salted water until barely tender, about 5 minutes. Drain.
2. Rinse with cold water and drain well. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. Heat 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet. Add half the apples and saute over medium heat for 5 minutes, turning once. Remove with a slotted spoon and add remaining apples to the skillet. Saute them. Return all apples to the skillet.
4. Sprinkle with 2 tbsp sugar and 1/2 tsp cinnamon. Saute 1 minute, tossing apples. Transfer to a separate bowl.
5. Melt remaining 4 tbsp butter in the skillet over low heat. Add 3 tbsp melted butter to noodles and mix well.
6. Stir in nuts, raisins, lemon peel, and salt.
7. Whip egg whites to soft peaks. Beat in remaining 4 tbsp sugar until whites are stiff but not dry. Stir yolks and vanilla into noodles.
8. Stir in half of the whites. Fold in remaining whites.
9. Add half of the noodle mixture to a greased 13" x 9" x 2-inch baking dish. Top with sauteed apples in an even layer.
10. Top with remaining noodle mixture and spread gently to cover apples.
11. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 tsp cinnamon, then with remaining 1 tbsp melted butter. Cover and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
12. Uncover and bake until set, about 20 more minutes. Serve hot.
